transactions.desc: The Athletics recalled Morales from Triple-A Las Vegas on Monday.
The Athletics optioned Basso to Triple-A Las Vegas on Monday.

Marinaccio was suspended three games by Major League Baseball for intentionally hitting Gunnar Henderson with a pitch during Saturday's game versus the Orioles, Kevin Acee of The San Diego Union-Tribune reports.
The Angels recalled Fermin from Triple-A Salt Lake on Monday.
The Angels selected Kerry's contract from Triple-A Salt Lake on Monday.
The Angels designated Pomeranz for assignment Monday.
The Rangers activated Smith (glute/wrist/illness) from the 10-day injured list Monday, Evan Grant of The Dallas Morning News reports.
The Rockies optioned Castellano to Triple-A Albuquerque on Monday.
The Rockies activated Vodnik (elbow) from the 15-day injured list Monday.
The Diamondbacks optioned Waldschmidt to Triple-A Reno on Monday.
The Diamondbacks activated Gurriel (hamstring) from the 10-day injured list Monday.
The Padres recalled Hart from Triple-A El Paso on Monday.
The Padres outrighted Johnson to Triple-A El Paso on Monday.
Atlanta outrighted Wynns to Triple-A Gwinnett on Monday.
Atlanta activated Baldwin (oblique) from the 10-day injured list Monday.
The Astros recalled Murray from Triple-A Sugar Land on Monday, Matt Kawahara of the Houston Chronicle reports.
The Astros optioned Santa to Triple-A Sugar Land on Monday, Matt Kawahara of the Houston Chronicle reports.
The Mets claimed Short off waivers from the Tigers on Monday.
The Mets optioned Duarte to Triple-A Syracuse on Monday.
The Mets recalled Pintaro from Triple-A Syracuse on Monday.
The Mets recalled Myers from Triple-A Syracuse on Monday.
The Royals promoted Chourio from Single-A Columbia to High-A Quad Cities on Monday.
The Kansas City Royals traded RHP Denis Samudio to the Toronto Blue Jays.
The Toronto Blue Jays traded RHP Connor Seabold to the Kansas City Royals.
The Royals recalled Spence from Triple-A Omaha on Monday.
The Mariners optioned Wisdom to Triple-A Tacoma on Monday.
The Phillies activated Berroa from the paternity leave list Monday and optioned him to Triple-A Lehigh Valley, Todd Zolecki of MLB.com reports.
The Seattle Mariners traded RHP Yosver Zulueta to the Chicago Cubs.
The Twins selected Fedko's contract from Triple-A St. Paul on Monday.
The Cubs designated Nikhazy for assignment Monday.
